motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:
def compareVersion(self, version1: str, version2: str) -> int:
    rev1, rev2 = map(int, version1.split('.'))
    return (rev1 if len(version1) < len(version2) else rev2) - rev2

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(min(len(version1), len(version2))
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
